bosses.name: 숲의 감시자
bosses.desc: Forest guardian boss, towering treant-like sentinel with glowing green eyes, bark armor, vine whips, dark fantasy forest protector

bosses.name: 독버섯 거인
bosses.desc: Giant poisonous mushroom boss

bosses.name: 숲의 사냥꾼
bosses.desc: Dark forest hunter boss

bosses.name: 숲의 기생수
bosses.desc: Parasitic tree boss, twisted dark tree with human faces trapped in bark, reaching branch claws, glowing red sap veins, dark fantasy horror tree

bosses.name: 벌레 수호자
bosses.desc: Bug guardian boss, massive armored beetle warrior, chitin shield, mandible jaws, dark fantasy insect knight

bosses.name: 점액 괴수
bosses.desc: Giant slime beast boss, translucent green body with bones visible inside, dripping acid, multiple eyes floating in slime, dark fantasy

bosses.name: 기생충 모체
bosses.desc: Parasite mother boss, bloated worm-like body, hundreds of tiny larvae crawling on surface, pulsating egg sacs, dark fantasy insect horror

bosses.name: 거대 알주머니
bosses.desc: Giant egg sac boss, massive pulsating organic sphere, translucent membrane showing larvae inside, web-covered, dark fantasy

bosses.name: 살벽의 군주
bosses.desc: Flesh wall lord boss, massive humanoid made of fused insect parts, chitin armor plates, mandible jaws, dark fantasy bug horror

bosses.name: 여왕 구더기
bosses.desc: Queen maggot boss, enormous pale grub with crown-like head crest, acid drool, segmented body, dark fantasy insect queen

bosses.name: 얼음 망령
bosses.desc: Ice wraith boss, spectral frozen ghost, ice crystal body, freezing aura, translucent pale blue, dark fantasy undead spirit

bosses.name: 서리의 기사
bosses.desc: Frost knight boss, heavy ice crystal armor, frozen greatsword, icicle crown helmet, glowing blue eyes through visor, dark fantasy ice warrior

bosses.name: 얼어붙은 감시자
bosses.desc: Frozen guardian boss, massive ice golem with ancient runes, crystal core in chest, frozen chains hanging from arms, dark fantasy

bosses.name: 얼음 속 봉인 괴물
bosses.desc: Sealed ice monster boss, half-frozen eldritch creature breaking free from ice prison, tentacles and claws emerging, dark fantasy horror

bosses.name: 화염 악마
bosses.desc: Flame demon boss, muscular red demon engulfed in hellfire, curved horns, burning claws, dark fantasy fire fiend

bosses.name: 불기둥 수호자
bosses.desc: Fire pillar guardian boss, living pillar of flame in humanoid form, obsidian core, magma cracks across body, dark fantasy fire elemental

bosses.name: 용암의 심장
bosses.desc: Heart of lava boss, massive molten rock golem with exposed lava core, volcanic eruptions from shoulders, dark fantasy

bosses.name: 화염 전사
bosses.desc: Flame warrior boss, muscular fire demon with burning sword and shield, charred black skin with fire cracks, dark fantasy

bosses.name: 화염 쌍두
bosses.desc: Two-headed flame boss, two dragon-like heads on muscular demon body, each head breathes different fire, dark fantasy

bosses.name: 불벌레 군주
bosses.desc: Fire bug lord boss, massive flaming beetle with lava shell, fire mandibles, ember wings, dark fantasy fire insect

bosses.name: 화염 감옥지기
bosses.desc: Flame jailer boss, tall armored figure with burning chains and keys, iron mask, ember cape, dark fantasy dungeon warden

bosses.name: 전쟁의 잔해
bosses.desc: Undead war commander boss, heavy dark iron armor with skull pauldrons, glowing red eyes, tattered war cape, massive war hammer

bosses.name: 뼈산의 왕
bosses.desc: Bone mountain king boss, massive skeleton king sitting on throne of bones, crown of skulls, giant bone scepter, dark fantasy undead

bosses.name: 악마 사령관
bosses.desc: Demon commander boss, tall red demon in black battle armor, curved horns, burning war banner on back, dark fantasy

bosses.name: 철벽 기사단장
bosses.desc: Iron wall knight captain boss, massive tower shield, full plate dark iron armor, red glowing visor, impenetrable stance, dark fantasy

bosses.name: 군단 지휘관
bosses.desc: Legion commander boss, skeletal general in tattered military coat, medals of bone, commanding pose, spectral soldiers behind, dark fantasy

bosses.name: 살점의 수호자
bosses.desc: Flesh guardian boss, massive creature made of stitched human flesh, exposed muscles and tendons, dark fantasy body horror

bosses.name: 인간뼈 감시자
bosses.desc: Human bone watcher boss, tall figure made entirely of human bones, skull head with glowing eyes, bone blade arms, dark fantasy body horror

bosses.name: 뒤틀린 자
bosses.desc: The twisted one boss, contorted human body bent in impossible angles, extra limbs growing from wrong places, pale skin, dark fantasy horror

bosses.name: 촉수의 어미
bosses.desc: Tentacle mother boss, massive fleshy creature with dozens of tentacles, central mouth with teeth rings, dark fantasy eldritch horror

bosses.name: 불완전 사도
bosses.desc: Incomplete apostle boss, half-formed humanoid angel with broken wings, exposed muscle on one side, cracked halo, dark fantasy fallen angel

bosses.name: 대사도
bosses.desc: Grand apostle boss, towering dark angel figure, six black wings, blindfolded face, golden corruption veins, holy dark fantasy final boss

bosses.name: 검은 성의 수호자
bosses.desc: Dark castle guardian boss, towering black armored knight, glowing purple eyes, shadow aura, massive dark halberd, dark fantasy

bosses.name: Killu
bosses.desc: Killu boss, sleek dark assassin demon, dual curved blades, blood red eyes, shadow cloak that moves like liquid, dark fantasy assassin lord

bosses.name: 지옥 군주
bosses.desc: Hell lord final boss, colossal demon king, massive black crown, six arms each holding different dark weapon, burning dark aura, ultimate dark fantasy demon overlord
